title: Document Management System
subtitle: Development of a Smart Document Approval Platform
overview: Built a smart document approval platform for Company-T's project teams, ensuring a seamless user experience, enhanced scalability through analytics, and support for multiple file formats.

sections.heading: Business Reason
sections.content: Company-T lacked a platform to track project statuses in real time and standardise its approval processes across project teams.

sections.heading: Objectives
content: Create a platform to place, manage, monitor, and track documents
Ensure seamless user experience during interface interaction
Enhance scalability through analytics
Accommodate arrays of file formats

sections.heading: Key Deliverables
content: AS-IS process flow
High-level requirement list
TO-BE process map
Wireframe

sections.heading: Methodology
sections.content: This project adopted a WAgile (flexible Agile) methodology, allowing for continuous adaptation and iterative delivery. Short development sprints were held weekly with cross-functional teams collaborating on planning, development, testing, and deployment.

sections.heading: Risk Management
content: Project Risk Register (PRR) created to outline general project risks
Continuous risk identification and monitoring
Contingent response plans triggered on risk identification
Regular PRR updates with documented justifications

sections.heading: Lessons Learned
sections.content: Iterative delivery and clear stakeholder communication were key to navigating scope changes and keeping the project on track.

title: Pen & Playlists Website
subtitle: End-to-End Website Development for an Afrobeats Media Company
overview: Developed an online platform for Pen & Playlists enabling direct value delivery to audiences through book releases, news stories, and event bookings.

sections.heading: Background
sections.content: Pen & Playlists is a media company dealing in high-quality products that elevate the Afrobeats experience. They needed a digital platform to serve their growing audience directly.

sections.heading: Requirements
content: Intuitive and engaging UI with clear navigation
Content management for text, images, and videos
User registration, profiles, and community engagement
E-commerce catalog for comics, news, and merchandise
Secure payment processing and scalable infrastructure

sections.heading: Prioritisation (MoSCoW)
content: Must: Website navigation, device adaptability, newsletter subscription, social media redirects
Should: User registration, login, product catalog, cart, and payment
Could: Glitch visual effect for enhanced UX

sections.heading: Process
sections.content: Led requirements gathering via a virtual workshop (Dec 31 2023) and three follow-up stand-ups in January 2024. Hired a developer based on cost-effectiveness and skill, and mapped the user journey via a cross-functional swim lane diagram.

sections.heading: Lessons Learned
sections.content: An iterative approach with MoSCoW prioritisation kept the project flexible and ensured the most critical features were delivered within the modest budget.

title: #80NigeriansNotFraudsters
subtitle: Digital Campaign to Restore Nigeria's National Image
overview: A counter-narrative digital campaign spotlighting 80 high-achieving young Nigerians in response to an FBI report that indicted 80 Nigerians for fraud.

sections.heading: State of Affairs
sections.content: Nigeria's international image was significantly damaged following an FBI report indicting 80 Nigerians for fraud, leading to widespread negative generalisation.

sections.heading: Approach
sections.content: Conducted research to identify 80 high-achieving young Nigerians across diverse fields. Highlighted their intelligence, passion, and resourcefulness as true ambassadors of Nigeria under the hashtag #80NigeriansNotFraudsters.

sections.heading: Results
sections.content: Successfully reached 2,276 individuals, shifting their perception of Nigerians and reinforcing qualities of intelligence, ambition, and resourcefulness.

title: Guardian Nigeria Campaign
subtitle: Digital Awareness Campaign for The Guardian Nigeria
overview: Developed a digital awareness campaign for The Guardian Nigeria reinforcing its core value proposition — reliability in journalism — under the concept #RE-LIE-ABLE.

sections.heading: Objective
sections.content: Generate word-of-mouth for The Guardian Nigeria and strengthen brand trust among an educated, news-conscious Nigerian audience aged 25–60.

sections.heading: Insight
sections.content: Trust in news is waning due to the prevalence of gossip and fake news. There is strong demand for a platform that consistently delivers reliable, fact-checked reporting.

sections.heading: Big Idea
sections.content: Reliable News — #RE-LIE-ABLE #GUARDIAN. The campaign made The Guardian's commitment to ethical journalism its defining differentiator.

sections.heading: Target Audience
content: Gender: Male, female, non-binary
Class: Upper and middle socioeconomic sections
Location: Nigeria
Profile: Educated, left-leaning news consumers

title: Brand Awareness Campaign
subtitle: High-Impact Festive Season Ad Campaign
overview: Spearheaded the development and execution of a high-impact festive season ad campaign for Client X, resulting in a 30% uptick in social media engagement.

sections.heading: Approach
sections.content: Began with extensive market research and competitor analysis. Followed by collaborative brainstorming to develop creative concepts aligned with Client X's brand identity, then sourced all production equipment and personnel.

sections.heading: Production
sections.content: The final montage featured bold visuals, captivating messaging, and vibrant colours. Client X's brand elements were seamlessly incorporated for consistency across all touchpoints including billboard and social media ads.

sections.heading: Challenges & Solutions
sections.content: Ensuring the carousel ad message was clearly understood by a wide audience. Addressed through thorough site surveys and close collaboration with the production team to optimise placement and sizing of visual elements.

sections.heading: Lessons Learned
sections.content: This project reinforced the importance of collaboration, creativity, and attention to detail. It also highlighted the value of data-driven decision-making and real-time adaptability.
